name: GizmoCraft Auto-Installing World Sync + Bliss Shader Pack

shaderPack.name: Bliss Shaders
shaderPack.requires: Iris Shaders + Sodium on Fabric, or OptiFine

install: Put mods/gizmocraft-world-sync-client-0.2.2.jar in your Minecraft mods folder. On launch it creates shaderpacks and downloads/verifies Bliss Shaders if missing. The shaderpack zip is also included for manual fallback. Do not put manifest.json or README.md in mods.

sharedMemory.description: Discovered world coverage and live client telemetry are recorded once through the GizmoCraft bridge and exposed to the dashboard as shared map memory.

capabilities: auto-installs verified Bliss Shaders into .minecraft/shaderpacks on client launch
sends live player position every 5 seconds while in-world
sends visited chunk heartbeats for shared dashboard coverage
